description_long: This object consists of two modern game controllers, one black and one white, placed side by side. Each controller features a familiar ergonomic design with rounded grips, a central Xbox logo button, a D-pad, two analog sticks, and an array of face buttons labeled A, B, X, and Y in colored lettering. The top edge of each controller includes shoulder buttons and triggers, while the front face displays a mix of matte and glossy finishes. The controllers are constructed primarily from molded plastic, with visible seams and textured grips for enhanced handling. The button layout and branding are consistent with Xbox controllers, suggesting compatibility with gaming consoles or PCs. The overall appearance is sleek, with a focus on comfort and intuitive interaction for gaming purposes.
description: A pair of modern Xbox-style game controllers, one black and one white, featuring ergonomic grips, analog sticks, and colored face buttons.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved ergonomic grips and the profile of the analog sticks and buttons.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full button layout, Xbox logo, and colored A, B, X, Y buttons on both controllers.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the face buttons, D-pad, and the textured grip surfaces.
description_view_3: Top view showing the shoulder buttons, triggers, and the overall width of the controllers.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, analog sticks, D-pad, triggers
